name: Configure questionnaire with 'Pages must be completed in order' and verify 'Hide' action is executed when Question condition is triggered on 'Entering the questionnaire the first time' and check condition 'Disable' action

steps.name: Configure questionnaire with settings and questions
Fill "short and long Text Questions" getByTestId('pageTitle')
Fill "Text Question with short text" getByTestId('questionName')
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Click locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Fill "Text Question with long text" getByTestId('questionName')
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('starts always empty', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('starts always empty', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('starts always empty', { exact: true })
Click locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('starts always empty', { exact: true })
Wait for selector getByText('Drag here to add questions')
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('Drag here to add questions')
Fill "Rich text and number questions" getByTestId('pageTitle')
Fill "Text Question with Rich text" getByTestId('questionName')
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Click locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Standard answer', { exact: true })
Fill "Text Question with Rich text" getByTestId('standardAnswer')
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Inherit the answer from the previous version', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Inherit the answer from the previous version', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Inherit the answer from the previous version', { exact: true })
Click locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Inherit the answer from the previous version', { exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"]').filter({ hasText: 'short and long Text Questions' })
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('[role="option"]').filter({ hasText: 'short and long Text Questions' })
Click locator('[role="option"]').filter({ hasText: 'short and long Text Questions' })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('option', { name: 'Entering the questionnaire the first time' })
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: 'Entering the questionnaire the first time' })
Click getByRole('option', { name: 'Entering the questionnaire the first time' })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('option', { name: 'short and long Text Questions', exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: 'short and long Text Questions', exact: true })
Click getByRole('option', { name: 'short and long Text Questions', exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('option', { name: 'Text Question with short text' })
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: 'Text Question with short text' })
Click getByRole('option', { name: 'Text Question with short text' })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('option', { name: 'short and long Text Questions', exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: 'short and long Text Questions', exact: true })
Click getByRole('option', { name: 'short and long Text Questions', exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('option', { name: 'Text Question with long text' }).first()
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: 'Text Question with long text' }).first()
Click getByRole('option', { name: 'Text Question with long text' }).first()
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('option', { name: 'short and long Text Questions', exact: true }).first()
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: 'short and long Text Questions', exact: true }).first()
Click getByRole('option', { name: 'short and long Text Questions', exact: true }).first()
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('option', { name: 'Text Question with short text', exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: 'Text Question with short text', exact: true })
Click getByRole('option', { name: 'Text Question with short text', exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('option', { name: 'Key Risk Indicator (KRI)', exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: 'Key Risk Indicator (KRI)', exact: true })
Click getByRole('option', { name: 'Key Risk Indicator (KRI)', exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('option', { name: 'Higher is better', exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: 'Higher is better', exact: true })
Click getByRole('option', { name: 'Higher is better', exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('option', { name: 'short and long Text Questions', exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: 'short and long Text Questions', exact: true })
Click getByRole('option', { name: 'short and long Text Questions', exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('option', { name: 'Text Question with short text', exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: 'Text Question with short text', exact: true })
Click getByRole('option', { name: 'Text Question with short text', exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('option', { name: '2 points scale', exact: true })
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: '2 points scale', exact: true })
Click getByRole('option', { name: '2 points scale', exact: true })
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('option', { name: 'Color Set 1', exact: true }).last()
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByRole('option', { name: 'Color Set 1', exact: true }).last()
Click getByRole('option', { name: 'Color Set 1', exact: true }).last()
Navigate to risk management and link questionnaire
Wait for selector getByText('Questionnaire 1777546335633 Link').getByRole('checkbox', { name: 'ql._id' })
Open questonnaire and verify short questions are visble
Verify unable to switch to next page
Verify Hide action is executed when Question condition is triggered on Entering the questionnaire the first time
Expect "not toBeVisible" locator('[data-test-mo-question-name="Text Question with long text"]')
Wait for selector locator('[data-test-mo-question-name="Text Question with short text"]')
Text question with Rich text is readOnly and has explanation
Verify Number question accepts only valid numbers with given length
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('span').filter({ hasText: 'All questionnaire pages are answered, do you want to finish the questionnaire? After finishing you cannot change something anymore.' })
verify Disable action executed when questionnaire condition is met
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('Text Question with short text').last()
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByText('Text Question with short text').last()
Click getByText('Text Question with short text').last()
Navigate to risk management and link questionnaire
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[aria-label="Close current version and start new version"]')
Expect "toBeEnabled" locator('[aria-label="Close current version and start new version"]')
Click locator('[aria-label="Close current version and start new version"]')
Open questonnaire and  Verify Hide action is not executed when Question condition is not met triggered on Entering the questionnaire the first time
Verify inherit answer from previous version
